title: Started Software Engineering
description: Began professional software development. Built foundational skills in web technologies and backend systems.

title: First Production System
description: Shipped a full-stack web application handling thousands of daily users. Learned about monitoring, deployments, and incident response.

title: Transitioned to Infrastructure
description: Shifted focus toward distributed systems and platform engineering. Began working with container orchestration and cloud infrastructure.

title: Built Developer Tools Suite
description: Designed and shipped a suite of CLI tools for improving team development workflows. The tools reduced onboarding time by 50%.

title: Designed Scheduling Platform
description: Architected and built a distributed job scheduling system handling complex dependency graphs. Learned about distributed consensus and fault tolerance.

title: AI Infrastructure & System Design
description: Built evaluation frameworks for LLM outputs and began documenting system design explorations as structured learning artifacts.
